command:
/usr/local/bin/node --loader tsx/esm server/src/index.ts &
sleep 3
curl -s http://localhost:4000/health
echo ""
curl -s http://localhost:4000/api/site-config/my-saas-app
echo ""
curl -s http://localhost:4000/widget.js | head -c 100
echo ""
kill %1 2>/dev/null

./node_modules/.bin/tsx server/src/index.ts &
sleep 3
curl -s http://localhost:4000/health
echo ""
curl -s http://localhost:4000/api/site-config/my-saas-app
echo ""
curl -s http://localhost:4000/widget.js | head -c 120
echo "..."
kill %1 2>/dev/null
npm show @fastify/cors versions --json 2>/dev/null | /usr/local/bin/node -e "const v=require('fs').readFileSync('/dev/stdin','utf8'); const arr=JSON.parse(v); console.log(arr.slice(-5).join('\n'))"

npm show @fastify/rate-limit versions --json 2>/dev/null | /usr/local/bin/node -e "const v=require('fs').readFileSync('/dev/stdin','utf8'); const arr=JSON.parse(v); console.log(arr.slice(-5).join('\n'))"

./node_modules/.bin/tsx server/src/index.ts &
sleep 3
curl -s http://localhost:4000/health
echo ""
curl -s http://localhost:4000/api/site-config/my-saas-app
echo ""
# Test that widget.js is served
curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" http://localhost:4000/widget.js
echo ""
kill %1 2>/dev/null

./node_modules/.bin/tsx server/src/index.ts &
SERVER_PID=$!
sleep 3
echo "--- /health ---"
curl -s http://localhost:4000/health
echo ""
echo "--- /api/site-config/my-saas-app ---"
curl -s http://localhost:4000/api/site-config/my-saas-app
echo ""
echo "--- /widget.js status ---"
curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" http://localhost:4000/widget.js
echo ""
echo "--- origin check (invalid origin) ---"
curl -s -w " HTTP %{http_code}" -H "Origin: https://evil.com" -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -X POST http://localhost:4000/api/chat \
  -d '{"siteId":"my-saas-app","messages":[{"role":"user","content":"hi"}]}'
echo ""
kill $SERVER_PID 2>/dev/null

lsof -ti:4000 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; sleep 1
./node_modules/.bin/tsx server/src/index.ts &
SERVER_PID=$!
sleep 3
echo "=== health ==="
curl -s http://localhost:4000/health | /usr/local/bin/node -e "process.stdin.setEncoding('utf8'); let d=''; process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c); process.stdin.on('end',()=>console.log(JSON.parse(d)))"
echo ""
echo "=== valid origin ==="
curl -s -o /dev/null -w "HTTP %{http_code}" -H "Origin: http://localhost:3000" http://localhost:4000/api/site-config/my-saas-app
echo ""
echo "=== invalid origin ==="
curl -s -o /dev/null -w "HTTP %{http_code}" -H "Origin: https://evil.com" http://localhost:4000/api/site-config/my-saas-app
echo ""
kill $SERVER_PID 2>/dev/null

lsof -ti:4000 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; sleep 1
./node_modules/.bin/tsx server/src/index.ts &
SERVER_PID=$!
sleep 3
echo "=== /api/chat with bad origin (server-side check) ==="
curl -s -H "Origin: https://evil.com" -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -X POST http://localhost:4000/api/chat \
  -d '{"siteId":"my-saas-app","messages":[{"role":"user","content":"hi"}]}'
echo ""
echo "=== /api/chat with unknown siteId ==="
curl -s -H "Origin: http://localhost:3000" -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -X POST http://localhost:4000/api/chat \
  -d '{"siteId":"does-not-exist","messages":[{"role":"user","content":"hi"}]}'
echo ""
kill $SERVER_PID 2>/dev/null

lsof -ti:4000 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; sleep 1
./node_modules/.bin/tsx server/src/index.ts &
SERVER_PID=$!
sleep 3
echo "=== env check ==="
curl -s http://localhost:4000/health
echo ""
kill $SERVER_PID 2>/dev/null

curl -s -N -X POST http://localhost:4000/api/chat \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -H "Origin: http://localhost:3000" \
  -d '{"siteId":"surfaceprobe","messages":[{"role":"user","content":"hi"}]}' &
sleep 6
lsof -ti:4000 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null

lsof -ti:4000 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; sleep 1
./node_modules/.bin/tsx server/src/index.ts > /tmp/server.log 2>&1 &
SERVER_PID=$!
sleep 3
curl -s -N -X POST http://localhost:4000/api/chat \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -H "Origin: http://localhost:3000" \
  -d '{"siteId":"surfaceprobe","messages":[{"role":"user","content":"hi"}]}' 2>&1
kill $SERVER_PID 2>/dev/null
npm install better-sqlite3 -w server 2>&1 | tail -4 && npm install @types/better-sqlite3 -w server --save-dev 2>&1 | tail -4
npm run build -w shared 2>&1 && npm run build -w widget 2>&1 | tail -6

lsof -ti:4000 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; sleep 1
./node_modules/.bin/tsx server/src/index.ts > /tmp/server.log 2>&1 &
SERVER_PID=$!
sleep 3

echo "=== health ==="
curl -s http://localhost:4000/health

echo ""
echo "=== save a conversation ==="
curl -s -N -X POST http://localhost:4000/api/chat \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -H "Origin: http://localhost:3000" \
  -d '{"siteId":"surfaceprobe","messages":[{"role":"user","content":"Is SurfaceProbe free?"}],"conversationId":"test-conv-1"}' \
  | grep -E "done|error" | head -1

echo ""
echo "=== admin list (with auth) ==="
curl -s -u ":localdev" http://localhost:4000/admin \
  | grep -o 'test-conv-1[^<]*' | head -1

echo ""
echo "=== admin list (no auth) ==="
curl -s -o /dev/null -w "HTTP %{http_code}" http://localhost:4000/admin

kill $SERVER_PID 2>/dev/null
